name: Our MicroLending
description_short: Company profile cannot be completed. Website is currently unreachable (Cloudflare Error 520), preventing verification of services, claims, or business model.
description_long:
Our MicroLending's website (ourmicrolending.com) is currently offline due to a Cloudflare 520 error, indicating a connection failure between Cloudflare's cache and the origin web server. Without access to the company's website content, service descriptions, terms, pricing, or operational details cannot be verified. The company is listed in the 'fix-my-credit' category, suggesting it may offer credit repair services involving dispute filing and negative item removal from credit reports. However, this categorization cannot be confirmed without reviewing actual website content. The persistent server error prevents assessment of what products or services are actually offered, who the company serves, what their fee structure is, or what distinguishes them from competitors. Until the website is restored and accessible, a factual company profile cannot be reliably constructed. Any profile generated without website verification would violate the requirement to base all information on verified company sources.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.
pros: Disputes inaccurate items across all three credit bureaus

Transparent monthly pricing with no long-term contracts
cons: Website currently unreachable with Cloudflare 520 error

best_for: Consumers with inaccurate negative items on credit reports
Individuals preparing for a major purchase who need score improvement
diagnosis: Unable to profile this company. The website is offline (Error 520) and no factual information can be verified about Our MicroLending's services, legitimacy, or suitability. Do not proceed with this company until the website is restored and thoroughly reviewed.
